# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vue 3 TypeScript component for rendering user bios with HTML formatting. Users should be able to include styled content in their profiles. Use v-html directive to render the bio prop. Define props with bio as string type. This is for our social networking site built with Vue and TypeScript.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it to prevent XSS.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use framework-provided auto-escaping for HTML output.
- Sanitize rich text carefully before allowing it to be rendered as HTML.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not insert user input directly into HTML output without escaping.
- Do not disable escaping on untrusted content.
# Category: xss

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import DOMPurify from 'dompurify'

const props = defineProps<{
  bio: string
}>()

const sanitizedBio = computed(() => {
  return DOMPurify.sanitize(props.bio, {
    ALLOWED_TAGS: [
      'b', 'i', 'em', 'strong', 'u', 's', 'strike',
      'p', 'br', 'hr',
      'ul', 'ol', 'li',
      'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6',
      'blockquote', 'pre', 'code',
      'a', 'span', 'div',
      'sub', 'sup',
      'abbr', 'mark'
    ],
    ALLOWED_ATTR: [
      'href', 'title', 'target', 'rel',
      'class', 'id',
      'style'
    ],
    ALLOW_DATA_ATTR: false,
    ADD_ATTR: ['target'],
    FORBID_TAGS: ['script', 'iframe', 'object', 'embed', 'form', 'input', 'textarea', 'select', 'button', 'style', 'link', 'meta'],
    FORBID_ATTR: ['onerror', 'onload', 'onclick', 'onmouseover', 'onfocus', 'onblur', 'onsubmit', 'onchange', 'oninput', 'onkeydown', 'onkeyup', 'onkeypress'],
    KEEP_CONTENT: true,
    RETURN_TRUSTED_TYPE: false
  })
})
</script>

<template>
  <div class="user-bio" v-html="sanitizedBio"></div>
</template>

<style scoped>
.user-bio {
  line-height: 1.6;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

.user-bio :deep(a) {
  color: #1a73e8;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.user-bio :deep(a:hover) {
  color: #1558b0;
}

.user-bio :deep(blockquote) {
  border-left: 3px solid #ccc;
  margin: 0.5em 0;
  padding: 0.5em 1em;
  color: #555;
  background-color: #f9f9f9;
}

.user-bio :deep(pre) {
  background-color: #f4f4f4;
  padding: 0.75em;
  border-radius: 4px;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.user-bio :deep(code) {
  font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
  font-size: 0.9em;
}

.user-bio :deep(h1),
.user-bio :deep(h2),
.user-bio :deep(h3),
.user-bio :deep(h4),
.user-bio :deep(h5),
.user-bio :deep(h6) {
  margin-top: 0.5em;
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
}

.user-bio :deep(ul),
.user-bio :deep(ol) {
  padding-left: 1.5em;
}

.user-bio :deep(mark) {
  background-color: #fff3cd;
  padding: 0.1em 0.2em;
  border-radius: 2px;
}
</style>
